items.title: TSMC second-quarter profit jumps over 77%, beating estimates, on high-end chip boom
items.description: TSMC announced a second-quarter profit, following its June revenue figures released earlier this week.

items.title: U.S. slaps 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods over 'unfair trade practices'
items.description: A separate U.S. probe into forced-labor enforcement could see an additional 12.5% duty on Brazilian goods on top of the 25%, with the decision due next week.

items.title: Alibaba and Baidu shares jump in Hong Kong on Apple AI partnership
items.description: The technological rivalry between China and the U.S. has intensified, as they race for AI dominance.

items.title: Bank of Korea raises rates to 2.75% in first hike in over three years
items.description: The 25 basis point hike by the Bank of Korea was in line with a survey of economists polled by Reuters.

items.title: SK Hynix shares plunge 11% as Asia sees tech rout, tracking U.S. chip losses
items.description: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday as a selloff in U.S. chipmakers spilled into the region.

items.title: Ex-Fed advisor gets over three years in prison for lying about China ties
items.description: The case marks one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of U.S. institutions, as Trump intensifies its pursuit of foreign economic espionage.

items.title: $100M New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
items.description: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.

items.title: Jim Cramer says he needs 'cold hard' proof that AI is paying off
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he’s looking for companies to start showing measurable financial returns from their AI investments.

items.title: Fed Chairman Warsh says he meets 'often' with Trump administration, defends independence
items.description: Kevin Warsh said Wednesday that he speaks with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent frequently outside their regular weekly meetings.

items.title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
items.description: As part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House financial services committee.

items.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
items.description: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

items.title: Kalshi traders see gas prices crossing $4 by end of July
items.description: Like last month's average, Kalshi traders see gas prices surpassing $4 by the end of July.

items.title: United earnings top estimates but airline expects $6 billion in added fuel costs
items.description: United reported higher revenue for premium, corporate and no-frills basic economy tickets and higher revenue for both domestic and international trips.

items.title: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
items.description: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.

items.title: SpaceX stock sinks below $135 IPO price for the first time
items.description: SpaceX shares fell for a fourth-straight session on Wednesday days after entering the Nasdaq-100

items.title: Trump's pick to head national intelligence, Jay Clayton, won't tell senators Biden won the 2020 election
items.description: The Senate Intelligence Committee is considering Jay Clayton's nomination to be the director of national intelligence.

items.title: J&J falls despite a beat-and-raise quarter. Why we're raising our price target anyways
items.description: Johnson & Johnson's quarter was imperfect, but enough is going right to validate our ownership of the stock.

items.title: Todd Blanche says he has 'full faith' in Kash Patel as FBI director
items.description: Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

items.title: Amazon senior cloud executive departs after 18 years
items.description: Brown helped launch one of AWS' oldest services and also oversaw its compute and machine learning units.

items.title: Public Service Loan Forgiveness has new rules — 3 changes borrowers should know about
items.description: Recent changes to Public Service Loan Forgiveness should prompt borrowers to confirm that their repayment plan and loan type remain eligible for the relief.
